notes: Won't sync to servers for DLC. Missing textures on character select and fight intro screens. Good performance. Works with ps3 controller. Right at the end of any match (story mode and vs computer mode tested) it either crashes to desktop or locks up and won't give other programs priority on screen so you either have to log out or shut down/restart manually. No tweaks tested yet.
title: Killer Instinct

notes: The game runs with some missing textures in charater screen and after battle. Sound and controls are perfect. Since the last 2 protons the game crashes to the desktop after ending a fight.
title: Killer Instinct

notes: Proton versions higher than 3.7-8 have issue with game crashing to desktop after any fight, basically rendering it unplayable. None of the online functions work due to the game being unable to connect to the servers. Minor graphics issues  on character select and pre-fight animations. Game is fully playable in single player/local multiplayer modes.
title: Killer Instinct

notes: Using proton 4.11-3, the characters are still missing polygons and textures on the select screen. There are also some missing textures on the stages during intro cutscenes. The game can't connect to the servers, so it's only playable offline.
title: Killer Instinct

notes: The game cannot properly sync to the servers. The characters graphics are not properly rendered in the select and pre-match screens. Also, some visual glitches appears during the pre-fight  presentations. After a fight is ended, the game hangs and crashes. The hanging issue does not happen in Lutris via the WineSteam runner (lutris-4.16 wine version), but the other issues happen as well.
title: Killer Instinct
